title: Calgara Draws His Spear
description: The Golden City and its bell become a promise between Noland and Calgara, giving the present-day battle its emotional weight.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 13, 14, this scene focuses on Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Musse, Shandia villager, Shandia warrior. The Golden City and its bell become a promise between Noland and Calgara, giving the present-day battle its emotional weight.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Tell me more about your travels.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: We want to treat you right!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: And there's even a map, Admiral!

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: Judging by this skull- shaped figure,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Keep your body well- rested for now.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Hey, lift up on your end!

dialogue.text: A month later since arriving on Jaya

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: Nolandd and his men are back!

dialogue.speaker: Aisa

dialogue.text: Even if they can make effective medicine,
